articles.title: Ukraine netted $70M in crypto donations since start of Russia conflict
articles.description: Since Russia’s invasion a year ago, there’s been $28.9 million in Ether donated to Ukraine, as well as $22.8 million in Bitcoin and $11.6 million in Tether.
